utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (including costs): 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs and a total; fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with monthly cost and total; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with monthly cost and total; fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services (professional liability, public liability, adventure activity) each with monthly costs and a total; fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides monthly breakdown per category, total monthly, annual cost, and extra notes; meets the complete monthly/annual cost breakdown requirement; fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item named in the final coverage plan to the closest exact name in the ground-truth catalog. Items not present in the ground-truth list (e.g., BerlinCare Basic Health Insurance, BudgetProtect Essentials Home Content Insurance, BackpackerSafe Basic Travel Insurance, Professional/Public Liability, and generic Adventure Activity Coverage) cannot be mapped. The only mappable item is 'SecureLife Basic Mental Health Coverage,' which corresponds to 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under mental health with rating 8.
